description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior is primarily clad in brown brick, with large windows on both floors providing ample natural light. The front features a prominent garage door and a main entry door, both set into the brick facade. The rear of the house opens onto a fenced backyard with a green lawn and a wooden deck area. The interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms and hallways, with a mix of light and dark wall finishes. The house is designed for urban or suburban settings, offering both private and communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a fenced backyard with a deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entry door, and large windows on the upper and lower floors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the brick wall, side windows, and the backyard with a green lawn and wooden deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, deck, and large windows facing the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, side windows, and the connection between the house and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, adjacent to a garage door, no porch or overhang, minimalistic modern style
